layman_headline: Extreme fear grips the crypto market — patience is the smartest play right now.
layman_explanation: The crypto market is deep in 'Extreme Fear' territory at 25/100 and getting worse. Bitcoin is holding around $64K but altcoins are bleeding, with Bitcoin dominance at 56.4% meaning money is flowing out of smaller coins and into BTC. None of the swing trade candidates offer a clean setup — the best charts are already overbought from recent rallies, and the cheapest coins are still falling with no sign of a bottom. This is a time to wait for better entries rather than chase.
layman_action: Stay in cash and wait. The market hasn't found a bottom yet and jumping in now risks catching a falling knife. Watch for fear to stabilize or reverse before committing capital.
expert_reasoning: Reviewing all 10 candidates systematically: BONK has a strongly bearish chart (-2.0 bias) with Three Black Crows and Bearish Marubozu — catching this knife is dangerous despite RSI at 31. LDO has the best chart bias (+0.85) with Three White Soldiers, but it's already up 23.5% in 7 days with a terrible risk/reward ratio of 0.38x — classic case of chasing after the move. DEXE is overbought at RSI 71 after a 63% 5-day surge. INJ and AERO both have sub-1.0 risk/reward ratios. ETH is the most interesting at RSI 39 with massive liquidity, but its chart bias is -0.70 and it's below all MAs. High BTC dominance (56.4%) is a headwind for all alts. The Fear & Greed at 25 and worsening suggests we haven't reached capitulation yet. Discipline demands waiting for a cleaner setup.
risk_factors: Fear & Greed index is still worsening (25, down from 27 yesterday) — capitulation flush could drag everything lower
BTC dominance at 56.4% is actively punishing altcoin positions — no signs of rotation back to alts
No candidate offers both oversold technicals AND bullish chart structure — the best setups are contradictory
watch_list: ETH holding $1,800 support — a decisive bounce here with volume would create a buy signal
Fear & Greed index stabilization or uptick above 30 — signals the worst selling pressure may be over
LDO pullback to $0.33-$0.34 range — would create a proper entry into the strongest chart pattern on the board
market_context: The crypto market is in Extreme Fear (25/100) with worsening sentiment and high BTC dominance squeezing alts. BTC itself is relatively flat at $63.9K, suggesting this isn't a broad panic but rather a slow bleed of confidence in altcoins.
context_banner: Extreme Fear and rising BTC dominance create a hostile environment for alt entries — capital preservation is the priority until sentiment stabilizes.

key_signals.description: Extreme Fear at 25/100 and worsening from 27 yesterday — market hasn't found a floor yet, making new entries premature.
ETH RSI at 39 is approaching oversold but not there yet; BONK at 31 is near oversold but chart structure is strongly bearish (-2.0) making it a trap.
FTX distributing $900M in fifth creditor payout could add sell pressure as recipients liquidate recovered crypto assets.
'ETH derivatives reset and the next retail trade' suggests a derivatives flush may be creating conditions for a future bounce, but timing is uncertain.
LDO shows Three White Soldiers (+0.85 bias) but 23.5% weekly gain and 0.38x risk/reward make chasing dangerous; best charts are already extended.
